description: Canonical structural containment graph exported from SQLite in the fixed 6-slot composite-key scheme (table + column nodes + has_column edges). This milestone covers the physical schema footprint only; the semantic layer is format-locked in key_scheme but deferred.

key_scheme.template: table : column|entity : family : perspective : predicate|none : unique_id|none

reserved_tokens.entity: slot 2 (index 1): placeholder marking a TABLE node (a table has no column)
reserved_tokens.none: slots 5-6 (index 4-5): placeholder marking a NODE (no predicate / no unique_id)
reserved_tokens.system: slot 4 (index 3): perspective reserved for the structural layer

key_scheme.name_constraints: A real column may never be named 'entity' or 'none'; a real table may never be named 'none'; a business perspective may never be 'system'. The exporter hard-fails if any source name collides.
key_scheme.parse_by: fixed slot positions: NODE iff slot[4]=='none' and slot[5]=='none' (table node if slot[1]=='entity', else column node); otherwise EDGE, whose family is slot[2].

graph_nodes.description: Supplier certification records (CoC, FAI, PPAP, 8130-3, Material Test Report)
AP invoice headers linked to purchase orders — three-way match and payment status
Labor time postings against work order operations (clock-in/out, hours, cost)
Raw material issues from stock to WIP work orders (quantity, unit cost, total cost)
Work order routing steps — sequence, resource, estimated vs actual hours and costs
Part / item master — description, class, UOM, cost, revision, material spec, CAGE code
Purchase order line items (part, quantity, unit cost, line total)
Purchase order headers for material and outside-service buys
Goods receipts against purchase orders — quantity ordered vs received, inspection status
Outside service definitions (anodize, heat treat, NDT, plating, painting)
Shop work centers and outside-service buckets (machine, labor, service types)
Work order master — part, quantity, status, routing template, accumulated actual costs
